# llms.txt
# Website: https://hollandviptransfers.com
# Guidance for Large Language Models (LLMs)

site: https://hollandviptransfers.com
owner: Holland VIP Transfers
contact: info@hollandviptransfers.com

# Allowed (What AI models can access/use)
allow:
  - indexing
  - summarization
  - citation
  - public_content_analysis

# Disallowed (What AI models should NOT use your content for)
disallow:
  - training
  - model_finetuning
  - data_extraction_for_training

# Content categories
content:
  - homepage
  - service_pages
  - about_us
  - faq
  - blog

# Privacy and sensitive data restrictions
restrictions:
  - no_personal_data
  - no_booking_details
  - no_customer_information

# Attribution rules (if any LLM quotes your content)
attribution:
  required: true
  format: "Source: Holland VIP Transfers (https://hollandviptransfers.com)"

last_updated: 2026-01-28
